The Embassy Belt

Constantia Luxury Green Belt

Ultimate privacy amongst diplomats and business leaders.
The wealthiest southern suburb of Cape Town.

Project Overview

Constantia is Cape Town's oldest and most affluent suburb. Renowned for its vast green belts, equestrian clubs, and top-tier mansions. This project offers expansive manor designs, emphasizing absolute privacy and luxury—the crown jewel of the South African property market.

Price Approx.

ZAR 16.2M

Privacy

Ultra High

Specs

5 Bed, 4 Bath

Plot Size

1200 m²
